title: neomammillaria pilispina
intro: Neomammillaria pilispina, also known as the 'Fine-Scaled Mammillaria', is a species of cactus that belongs to the family Cactaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Neomammillaria pilispina include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
